name: Consumer Financial Services
description_short: Consumer Financial Services is a personal lending provider based in Indianapolis, Indiana. Rated 3.3/5 with 46 Google reviews, reflecting mixed customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Consumer Financial Services is a personal lending provider serving clients in Indianapolis, Indiana. Carrying a 3.3/5.0 Google rating from 46 reviews, Consumer Financial Services has an mixed reputation among consumers in the Indianapolis area looking to secure personal loans with competitive terms.

Operating as a financial planner, Consumer Financial Services provides a range of services for consumers seeking personal lending solutions.

Personal loan providers in Indianapolis vary significantly in terms of APR ranges, loan amounts, fees, and eligibility requirements. When comparing options, consumers should pay attention to the total cost of the loan including origination fees, prepayment penalties, and the effective APR. Consumer Financial Services competes in a market where transparency and competitive rates are increasingly important to borrowers who have multiple lending options available.

Consumers in the Indianapolis, Indiana area who are considering Consumer Financial Services should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any personal lending provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
